cause: The first run paused after the evaluator repeatedly produced a nextPrompt with excessive enumeration punctuation. The next CLI invocation omitted --resume, initialized the result path as a fresh run, then failed to click the new Office Task control because it was outside Playwright's calculated viewport.
repairs: Evaluator retry feedback now targets excessive enumeration punctuation and preserves the rest of the decision.
New Office Task click now falls back to the application's DOM click handler only when the unique visible control is outside the calculated viewport.
The replacement run uses a new result path so failed-attempt evidence is not overwritten again.
